user.title: Authorize Family Safety
user.description:
Go to **{url}** on any device and enter the code **{code}**.

The code expires in {expires_in} minutes. Click Submit once you have approved it.

error.auth_pending: Not yet approved — please visit the URL and enter the code, then click Submit.
error.auth_expired: The code has expired. A new code has been generated — please try again.

abort.already_configured: Microsoft Family Safety is already configured.

set_allowance.name: Set Screen Time Allowance
set_allowance.description: Set the screen time allowance for a child on a given day.

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week (e.g. monday) or 'today'. Defaults to today.

minutes.name: Minutes
minutes.description: Screen time allowance in minutes. Use 0 to block entirely.

add_allowance.name: Add Screen Time
add_allowance.description: Add (or subtract) minutes from a child's screen time allowance on a given day.

day.name: Day
day.description: Day of the week (e.g. monday) or 'today'. Defaults to today.

minutes.name: Minutes
minutes.description: Minutes to add (use negative to reduce).
